summary.narrative: GoWell Singapore HQ occupies a 700 sqm industrial strata floor (Units #04-51/54) at Bulim Lane 2 within JTC's Cleantech Two development in Jurong Innovation District. The space functions as GoWell Energy Solutions' corporate headquarters, housing executive management, engineering, finance, and ESG functions. The asset is fully owner-occupied with no rental income; its operational cost to the business is absorbed through corporate overheads. With GoWell's SGX Mainboard IPO targeted for H1 2027, this asset is undergoing ring-fencing analysis to determine whether it will sit within the listed entity or be retained at the trust level.
summary.keyMessage: HQ property fully operational · SGD 4.68M assessed value (USD 3.48M) · IPO ring-fencing review ongoing — disclosure obligations to SIAS by Q3 2026

basicInfo.submarket: Jurong Innovation District (JID) — Cleantech Two, JTC
basicInfo.ownershipSummary: GoWell Energy Solutions Pte. Ltd. (100%); Zhang Family Trust 71.3% beneficial interest
basicInfo.landArea: Strata title — no separate land parcel

actions.title: IPO Preparation — Corporate Asset Ring-Fencing & SGX Disclosure
actions.recommendation: Engage KPMG / Deloitte to prepare independent valuation report for SGX Mainboard listing prospectus. Determine whether HQ strata unit is included within GoWell's listed entity perimeter or retained at family trust level. Disclosure obligations under MAS CG Code must be resolved before prospectus lodgement.
actions.decisionNeeded: Include HQ within IPO entity or carve out to trust — decision required by CFO and legal counsel

actions.title: JTC Lease Renewal Planning — 12-Year Residual
actions.recommendation: Begin pre-renewal discussions with JTC Corporation approximately 3 years before expiry (Dec 2035). Given IPO proceedings, confirm whether JTC sub-lease consent is required for change in beneficial ownership following share listing.
actions.decisionNeeded: Confirm JTC change-of-control consent requirements with corporate secretary

actions.title: Fire Suppression System Upgrade — Annual Fire Safety Certificate
actions.recommendation: Annual SCDF-mandated FSC renewal completed March 2026. System compliant. No immediate action required.

topRisks.title: IPO Disclosure Risk
topRisks.impact: Non-disclosure or incorrect valuation of HQ in IPO prospectus could trigger SGX regulatory action and delay listing timeline.

topRisks.title: JTC Lease Residual (12 yrs)
topRisks.impact: Declining lease term reduces financing options and may create refinancing or exit complexity post-2032.

topRisks.title: Market Value Softening
topRisks.impact: Jurong industrial strata values have underperformed central CBD; limited liquidity in secondary market.

marketSnapshot.submarket: JID Jurong Innovation District — Industrial Strata
